channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australia’s fuel supply is stable despite public concerns
item.description: Despite media reports suggesting a looming fuel crisis in Australia, the reality is far less dramatic. Concerns arose after the government announced the nation had only 30 days of fuel reserves, promp...

item.title: CBN Governor says Nigeria’s economy resilient amid global economic challenges
item.description: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Olayemi Cardoso, don talk say Naija economy don dey strong and ready to handle wahala from global economic shocks. As he dey speak for Africa Capital...

item.title: AIPAC Experiences Mixed Outcomes in Illinois Democratic Primaries, Prompting Internal and External Criticism
item.description: The American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) encountered mixed results in its first significant test during the 2026 midterm primaries in Illinois, where it invested heavily in four competitiv...

item.title: Gondola Detaches at Swiss Ski Resort, One Person Seriously Injured
item.description: A serious accident occurred on Wednesday at a ski resort in the canton of Obwalden, Switzerland, when a gondola detached from its cable and rolled down a snow-covered mountainside. Dramatic footage ca...

item.title: Funding cuts threaten closure of Niagara Region’s safe drug consumption site, raising public health concerns
item.description: The Niagara Region’s only safe drug consumption site in St. Catharines, Ontario, is facing closure after the provincial government announced that funding for the site will end in 90 days. Positive Liv...

item.title: Nagpur Gangster Arrested With Help of Partner and Lawyer
item.description: In a significant development from Nagpur, the police successfully apprehended a notorious gangster with the assistance of his live-in partner and a lawyer. According to reports, the gangster had been ...

item.title: NSC DG Olopade Supports Senator Adeola, Calls on Ogun Youths to Engage in Politics
item.description: For Ogun State, politics dey hot as the Director-General of the National Sports Commission, Bukola Olopade, don openly support Senator Olamilekan Adeola for the 2027 governorship. Olopade talk say Ade...

item.title: 2026 Assembly Polls Updates: Key Developments Including Bordoloi's Switch to BJP, DMK-CPI Alliance, Observer Deployments, and MCC Enforcement
item.description: On March 18, 2026, several significant updates emerged regarding the upcoming Assembly elections in Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, and Puducherry. Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi resigned from Cong...

item.title: Zambia debates Tobacco Control Bill amid economic and health concerns
item.description: Zambia is currently embroiled in a heated debate over a proposed Tobacco Control Bill, which aims to protect citizens from the severe health, social, and economic consequences of tobacco use. The Bill...

item.title: South Australia's election campaigns show the impact of verified political advertising laws
item.description: South Australia has long operated under a law requiring truth in political advertising, a measure that compels political parties to verify claims in their campaign materials before they are published....

item.title: Rivers Police Arrest Suspect, Recover Remains of Murdered Man
item.description: For Rivers State, police don finally catch 29-year-old Robinson Uche wey dem dey suspect for murder of 42-year-old Shedrack Ogadinma Chukwem from Umuemeshie Community, Chokota, Etche LGA. According to...

item.title: Terrafirma Dyip tops PBA standings after defeating Blackwater Bossing
item.description: In an exciting match in the PBA, Terrafirma Dyip claimed a decisive victory over the Blackwater Bossing, moving to the top of the league standings. The game showcased Terrafirma’s consistent performan...

item.title: Tanga Region Councils Work to Improve Revenue Collection with Korogwe Leading
item.description: Local government authorities in Tanga Region are struggling to meet revenue targets while still funding key development projects. Between July 2025 and February 2026, councils collected 32.45 billion ...

item.title: Vancouver Police Investigate Possible Evidence Tampering in High-Profile Murder Case
item.description: Vancouver police are conducting an investigation, known as Project Loyalty, into whether someone with access to the department's property office colluded with organized criminals to tamper with eviden...

item.title: Imran Khan’s sons may visit Pakistan using NICOP after Jemima Goldsmith’s appeal
item.description: On 18th March 2026, Pakistan’s Information Minister, Attaullah Tarar, confirmed that the sons of former Prime Minister Imran Khan, namely Kasim and Suleiman, are allowed to visit Pakistan using their ...

item.title: Kid Rock questions DOJ settlement in Ticketmaster antitrust case
item.description: Kid Rock, a longtime supporter of Donald Trump, has publicly criticized the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) following its settlement in a major antitrust case involving Ticketmaster and its parent co...

item.title: Chalmers outlines May 12 budget focused on tax reform, productivity, and savings
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has pledged that the upcoming federal budget, to be delivered on May 12, will prioritise fiscal responsibility, tax reform, and boosting productivity. Speaking to the Australian...

item.title: Pakistan dismisses India’s statement over counter-terrorism strikes in Afghanistan
item.description: On Wednesday, Pakistan’s Foreign Office officially rejected India’s statement condemning Pakistan’s airstrikes against terrorist infrastructure in Afghanistan. The strikes, carried out overnight in Ka...

item.title: South East Development Commission Pledges Financial Support for 2026 National Sports Festival in Enugu
item.description: The 2026 National Sports Festival, wey dem tag Coal City Games, for Enugu State don dey receive plenty support as South East Development Commission (SEDC) come join as the latest partner. Mark Okoye, ...

item.title: Strengthening Collaboration Between Government and NGOs Key to Reducing Gender-Based Violence in South Africa
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa declared gender-based violence and femicide a national disaster in November 2025, signalling urgency in tackling a long-standing crisis in South Africa. Despite this, the iss...
